title: Easter Morning
description: A traditional Easter dawn service open to all, celebrating the season in the peaceful setting of Brampton Old Church. All are welcome.

title: Church Open Day
description: The church will be open in the afternoon for a talk by Maks Loth-Hill and a tour of the graveyard focusing on some of the mediaeval graves and local history.

title: St. Ninian's Day Open Evening
description: Join us to celebrate St Ninian's day at Brampton Old Church. Local historian Maks Loth-Hill will present insights and stories about St Ninian and the Old Church in his 6:45 pm talk — Saint Ninian, Brampton, and the World of Early Christianity.

title: Memorial of St Ninian, Bishop
description: To commemorate his ministry and patronage of our chapel in Brampton, Mass will move from Our Lady and St Wilfrid to Brampton Old Church followed by refreshments.
